adjudication_raw: Single assessor identifies candidate pool confound as primary flaw, notes replay evaluation cannot attribute gain to ranker, and confirms leave-last-week-out and uniform user sample are not themselves flaws. Verdict: critique_wins.
all_issues_raised: Problem 1: Confounded candidate pools — each reranker evaluated on different input set
Problem 2: Candidate pool size (200 vs 500) not isolated from ranker effect
Problem 3: No factorial ablation between retriever and reranker changes
